---
title: "Kelvin's Space"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: profile.jpg
  links:
    - icon: briefcase
      text: Portfolio
      href: https://kemboikelvin-portfolio.vercel.app/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/KelvinKemboi/
---

# Welcome

Hi, I’m **Kelvin** — welcome to my little corner of the internet.

I’m a student interested in **computer science & math**, currently studying at **Colgate University**.

---

## What this site is

This website is a place where I:

Share a bit about myself  
Document what I’m learning  
Experiment with ideas and projects  

---

## What I’m currently focused on

Right now, I’m working on improving in:

Data Structures & Algorithms  
Statistics and Probability  
Backend development  
Machine Learning fundamentals  

---

## My interests

Some of the areas I’m most interested in are:

Software engineering  
Machine learning  
Statistics  

---

## My goals

Some of my goals are to:

Become a stronger programmer  
Build meaningful projects  
Improve my problem-solving skills  

---

## Outside of academics

Outside of class, I enjoy running and playing piano. I’m also interested in building projects that connect with these interests.

---

## What you’ll find here

My interests and goals  
Future projects and experiments  

---

Thanks for stopping by.
